message.msgTxt: '{"term":"Spring 2025","asOf":"2025-03-08","kpis":{"activeStudents":12,"studentsWithHolds":6,"onAcademicProbation":2,"pendingRequests":5,"waitlisted":2,"overdueDeadlines":4,"systemErrors":6,"coursesAtCapacity":3},"priorityQueue":[{"title":"Financial Aid certification overdue - 7 students at risk","category":"Deadline - Financial Aid","severity":"Critical","due":"Past due 45d"},{"title":"Add/Drop deadline passed - 3 pending requests need override","category":"Deadline - Enrollment","severity":"Critical","due":"Past due 41d"},{"title":"Financial Aid System: 7 students enrolled but not certified","category":"System Error","severity":"Critical","due":""},{"title":"Tyler Brooks - ENG-350 blocked by Financial Hold","category":"Enrollment - Add","severity":"High","due":""},{"title":"Devon Mitchell - HIST-105 blocked by Academic Hold","category":"Enrollment - Add","severity":"High","due":""},{"title":"Megan Walsh - EDUC-495 blocked by Background Check hold","category":"Enrollment - Add","severity":"High","due":""},{"title":"Marcus Rivera - Academic Probation (GPA 2.4)","category":"Student - Business Administration","severity":"High","due":""},{"title":"Devon Mitchell - Academic Probation (GPA 2.2)","category":"Student - History","severity":"High","due":""}],"enrollmentByStatus":{"goodStanding":10,"academicProbation":2},"coursesAtCapacity":3,"totalCourses":10,"upcomingDeadlines":[{"title":"Withdrawal Deadline (W Grade)","date":"2025-03-14","category":"Enrollment"},{"title":"Summer 2025 Registration Opens","date":"2025-03-10","category":"Registration"},{"title":"Spring Grade Submission Deadline","date":"2025-05-15","category":"Grading"}]}'
